gist.headline: Daily greenhouse check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the daily app metrics across the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase and README up-to-date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (representing the automated bot) watering plants (metrics/greenhouse) alongside Polly the bee, symbolizing the daily automated maintenance of the app ecosystem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital garden of code-plants alongside the tiny bee mascot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital garden of code-plants alongside the tiny bee mascot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
